description: A collection of modulated circuits, each containing a list of Ensembl gene IDs belonging to that circuit.

items.description: Represents a single modulated circuit and its associated gene members.

modulated_circuit.description: Identifier for the modulated circuit, following the pattern 'gene_set_{N}'.

ensembl_gene_id.description: List of Ensembl gene IDs belonging to this modulated circuit.
